pages.title: EVCS | EV Fast Charging Simplified
pages.description: Since our founding in 2018, EVCS has been a leader in the automotive electric revolution, building one of the largest and fastest growing public EV charging networks in the U.S. Our vision is to decarbonize transportation by accelerating mass consumer adoption of clean, carbon free electric vehicles. We are on a mission to lower the barriers to entry for both consumers and businesses by rapidly expanding access to fast, affordable and conveniently located public EV charging. Through innovative subscription charging plans, we strive to lower the total cost of EV ownership, saving drivers hundreds of dollars annually vs. pay-per-charge and gas alternatives.

## Mission & Vision

EVCS’ vision is to accelerate the transition to clean, carbon free transportation. We do this by rapidly expanding access to fast, affordable and conveniently located public EV charging.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628156a3c8615773cabd3d72/62f15b838c77f53621fd986c_004-energy.svg)

Electric Miles Driven

126.3M

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628156a3c8615773cabd3d72/62f15c6f551494aa14760900_Union%20(2).svg)

Gallons of Gas Saved

2.73M gallons

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628156a3c8615773cabd3d72/62f15c1663e2207b4052a62c_003-recycling.svg)

\# of Trees Planted

400,737

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628156a3c8615773cabd3d72/62f25edfe38c6d36031171a1_Union%20(4).svg)

CO2 Prevented/Offset

24,235 metric tons

Accelerate the transition to clean, carbon free transportation.

Lead the rapid build out of the national EV charging network.

Lower the total cost of EV ownership.

Make public EV charging fast and convenient.

[Learn More](https://www.evcs.com/about-us)

## EVCS News

[All Blog Posts](https://www.evcs.com/blog)

[MAR 19 ◦ 2024\\
\\
**EVCS Secures $100 Million in Public Funding to Add DC Fast Chargers on the West Coast** \\
\\
EVCS is excited to announce securing commitments for more than $100 million in public funding. The funding will support the development...\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-secures-100-million-in-public-funding-to-add-dc-fast-chargers-on-the-west-coast) [AUG 23 ◦ 2023\\
\\
**EVCS Celebrates 2 Million Miles of EV Charging with Hertz Rideshare Renters** \\
\\
EVCS is thrilled to announce reaching a major milestone in its collaboration with Hertz: two million miles of EV charging by Hertz rideshare renters.\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-celebrates-2-million-miles-of-ev-charging-with-hertz-rideshare-renters) [JUL 6 ◦ 2022\\
\\
**EVCS Raises $68.8 Million to Accelerate Expansion of West Coast EV Fast Charging Network** \\
\\
EVCS today announced the completion of a $68.8 million funding raise, comprised of a $50 million debt facility from Spring Lane Capital, and a...\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-raises-68-8-million-to-accelerate-expansion-of-west-coast-ev-fast-charging-network)

[MAR 19 ◦ 2024\\
**EVCS Secures $100 Million in Public Funding to Add DC Fast Chargers on the West Coast** \\
EVCS is excited to announce securing commitments for more than $100 million in public funding. The funding will support the development, installation, and operation of more than 500 new DC Fast chargers across California,Oregon, and Washington.\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-secures-100-million-in-public-funding-to-add-dc-fast-chargers-on-the-west-coast)

[JUL 12 ◦ 2023\\
**EVCS Begins Installation of EV Chargers at LA Fitness & Esporta Fitness** \\
The installation covers 143 DC Fast and 22 Level 2 chargers at 24 locations throughout California, Oregon and Washington.\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-begins-installation-of-ev-chargers-at-la-fitness-esporta-fitness)

[JUL 06 ◦ 2022\\
**EVCS Raises $68.8 Million to Accelerate Expansion of West Coast EV Fast Charging Network** \\
EVCS today announced the completion of a $68.8 million funding raise, comprised of a $50 million debt facility from Spring Lane Capital, and a...\\
\\
Read More](https://www.evcs.com/blog/evcs-raises-68-8-million-to-accelerate-expansion-of-west-coast-ev-fast-charging-network)

## Testimonials

“What makes the EVCS network so great and crucial are the locations of the stations being at the scenic destinations and filling in the gaps between other companies. The eco-friendly sourced power and the membership plan are also a major plus to this network. EVCS makes exploring the beautiful West Coast in an EV a stress free and reliable experience!”

Charles K.

Car: Rivian R1T

"The EVCS chargers are incredibly convenient and comforting for those of us with shorter-range EVs that want to be able to drive them far. The new chargers have been easy to use with the app, reliable, and reasonably priced as well, making my overall experience awesome!

Scott J.

Car: Nissan Leaf

"EVCS charging works great with the app. Session started up easy and got a coffee while the car charged. That is super important to me. This is the way these things are supposed to be set up."

Rich M.

Car: Volkswagen e-Golf

"EVCS acquired a network of EV chargers near I-5 and Highway 101, in the Pacific North West, Oregon and Washington. All the charging stations were replaced with new hardware and software, and are much more reliable. Their subscription is a great deal. It costs me roughly $2 per day to drive no matter how far I drive my Tesla using the EVCS network. Gasoline would cost me about $15 per day. Thanks, EVCS!"

Liam's Dad

‍Car: Tesla Model 3

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/628156a3c8615773cabd3d72/62f1cb0e9576fdb17e2f8760_Vector%20(24).svg)
